title: Cartoon Texture Concept Update 1.20+
description: Cartoon Texture Pack from legacy console updated to newer versions
body:
Cartoon Texture Concept Update 1.20+ is a Unofficial Continuation resource pack of the Cartoon Texture Pack by 4J Studios, the original pack have been discontinued since 1.19, This resource pack changes the look of the newer blocks, items and mobs of what if the Cartoon Texture Pack continued updating after 1.19?
This is supposed work with the overlay of the Cartoon Texture Pack and will NOT work properly without it.
![Cartoon Texture Pack Support for Newer Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc5a69bb7a999970e2184c93138bbe80d565dd9f.png)
